---
title: "Hello, world"
description: "A new website, built the same way as the CV."
date: 2026-05-18
categories: [meta]
---

This site is now live. It's a Quarto website that shares a build pipeline
with my CV: the same BibTeX files, Google Sheets, and Google Scholar cache
feed both the PDFs and the pages here. That means my publications list,
citation counts, and impact factors stay in sync without a separate
maintenance burden.

More writing to come. For now, the [publications](../../publications.html)
and [projects](../../projects.html) pages are the main attractions.
